name: @ophis/plugin-elizaos
description: elizaOS plugin: MEV-protected same-chain swaps via Ophis (CoW Protocol). The agent signs CoW orders with its own EVM key; the Ophis partner fee + your referral code accrue the 8-12% rebate.

EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.description: 0x hex private key (EOA) the agent signs CoW orders with. Keep it funded with the sell token + a little native gas for the one-time approval.

OPHIS_REFERRAL_CODE.description: Ophis referral/partner code so your swaps earn the 8-12% rebate. Mint one at https://swap.ophis.fi/#/rewards. Optional — swaps work without it.

OPHIS_FEE_CHAIN.description: OPTIONAL default chain for requests that don't name one (e.g. base, unichain, arbitrum). If UNSET, a swap request MUST name its chain — the plugin never silently picks one. No default is provided on purpose.
